---
title: "draft"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
nhl_20245 <- read_csv("Tim_Kashkarov/nhl_khl/nhl_20245.csv")
khl_20245 <- read_csv("Tim_Kashkarov/nhl_khl/khl_20245.csv")
```

```{r}
nhl_20245 <- nhl_20245 |> transmute(league = "NHL", team = Team, WinPerc = Wins / GamesPlayed)
khl_20245 <- khl_20245 |> transmute(league = "KHL", team = Team, WinPerc = Wins / GamesPlayed)
df <- bind_rows(nhl_20245, khl_20245)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = league, y = WinPerc)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Win% spread: NHL vs KHL (2024/25)", x = "", y = "Win% (W/GP)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
